schema_authority: This file is the single source of truth for td_cli.py. Consult before every CLI call. Takes precedence over examples in AGENTS.md or any agent-specific instruction file.
description: Custom developer CLI for BoomTick repository management. Do not use interactive menus, and NEVER use the -h or --help flags. Always reference this schema for valid commands.
never_do: Do not chain subcommands in a single shell call
Do not use --help or -h to discover flags — use this schema
Do not guess flags not listed here
Do not run td_cli.py without checking this schema first
Do not use interactive menus if prompted

doctor.description: Performs a runtime consistency check (Node.js and pnpm versions) to ensure the environment matches the project contract.

gh search-prs.description: Lists open Pull Requests with optional filtering by state, limit, draft status, and labels.

gh pr-diff.description: Fetches PR diff and file list, applying truncation and shaping.

gh merge-conflicts.description: Detects merge conflicts for a PR against a base branch.

repo ci-logs.description: Fetches CI logs for failing (or all) check runs in a PR.

repo logs.description: Fetches and combines CI logs for all jobs in a PR, optionally filtered by grep.

repo run-playwright.description: Runs Playwright tests and returns failed tests in JSON.

gh conflicts.description: Runs a global check across the repository to detect any active PR merge conflicts.
gh conflicts.expected_output: A list of conflicting files and branches. Does not resolve conflicts.

gh resolve-conflicts.description: Sets up a separate git worktree, checks out the PR branch, and attempts to merge the target branch to surface conflicts for resolution.

gh parse-comment.description: Parses a comment body to determine intended actions (e.g. @conflict-resolve).

required_flags.description: The author association (e.g. OWNER, MEMBER, COLLABORATOR).

gh post-comment.description: Adds a new comment to a Pull Request from a file or literal text.

optional_flags.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the comment body.
The literal body text for the comment.

gh detect-conflicts.description: Detects conflicts for a single, specific Pull Request.

gh status-board.description: Retrieves the current high-level status board for open PRs and background tasks.

gh overlaps.description: Identify and propose consolidation of PRs with high functional or structural overlap.

optional_flags.description: Maximum number of open PRs to process (default: 50).
Bust the cache and force fetching data from GitHub.

gh audit-pr.description: Perform an automated audit on a specific Pull Request.

optional_flags.description: Submit the audit results as a comment.
The type of GitHub event (e.g., COMMENT).

gh manage-reviews.description: Check and manage responses to automated PR reviews.

optional_flags.description: Verify if feedback responses have been addressed.

gh pre-submit.description: Run automated repository validation and quality gates prior to code submission.

gh create-issue.description: Creates a new GitHub issue using a title and either a markdown file or literal text for the body.

optional_flags.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the issue body.
The literal body text for the issue.

gh issue-view.description: Fetches details of a GitHub issue including title, body, and state.

gh issue-update.description: Updates the body of a GitHub issue from a file or literal text.

optional_flags.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the new issue body.
The literal body text for the issue.

gh issue-comment.description: Adds a new comment to a GitHub issue from a file or literal text.

optional_flags.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the comment body.
The literal body text for the comment.

gh validate-issue.description: Validates that a GitHub issue follows the Spec-Driven Issue Template.

optional_flags.description: The GitHub issue number to validate.
Post validation results as comments on the issue.

agent fix-ci.description: Initialize an AI agent (Jules) session to fix CI failures for a PR or branch.

optional_flags.description: The PR number to fix CI for.
The branch name to fix CI for (if no PR exists).

agent dispatch.description: Initialize a Jules session for a specific branch and task.

required_arguments.name: branch
required_arguments.description: The target branch for the task. Note: Use 'main' branch for PR consolidation tasks to avoid rebasing issues.

agent sync.description: Sync and list active agent sessions.

agent messages.description: Retrieve message history for a specific agent session.

required_arguments.name: session_id
required_arguments.description: The ID of the Jules session.

agent send.description: Send a message to an active agent session.

required_arguments.name: session_id
required_arguments.description: The ID of the Jules session.
